notes: Placeholder expected-fiducials map for the read-only pre-flight gate. Physical ArUco tags must be placed on the deck slots (and, for grip work, on the iSWAP), the overhead camera fixed relative to the deck, and cx/cy calibrated against a representative frame before this governs a real run. tol_px is generous here on purpose; tighten it once real numbers exist. expect_mm and marker_mm are only used when a camera calibration is passed via --calib.
